title: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting
description: User-supplied input in the search parameter is reflected without output encoding.
remediation: Encode all user-controlled output and deploy a strict Content-Security-Policy.

title: SQL Injection in Login Form
description: The username field is concatenated directly into a SQL query allowing authentication bypass and data extraction.
remediation: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements and apply least-privilege DB accounts.

title: Verbose Error Messages
description: Stack traces and framework versions are disclosed on unhandled exceptions.
remediation: Disable debug mode in production and return generic error pages.

title: Missing Security Headers
description: Responses lack HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options and X-Frame-Options headers.
remediation: Add standard security response headers at the web server or framework level.
